nodes.label: Agent-facing instruction docs
nodes.summary: The `context/output/instructions.py` generators that emit HOW_TO_USE.md, the architecture overview and task playbooks for Claude navigation.

nodes.label: Audit panel & onboarding
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/audit/` adversarial audit-panel domain (catalog, workspace, personas, log) together with the `cli/onboard.py` onboarding flow and config domain it shares.

nodes.label: Bootstrap renderer
nodes.summary: The `context/output/bootstrap.py` + `cli/bootstrap.py` surface that renders the initial bootstrap scaffolding for a freshly-indexed repo.

nodes.label: Build-loop checklist & waves
nodes.summary: The `buildloop/` domain plus `cli/build_loop/` that derive a wave-grouped checklist from a proposal and dispatch mutually-independent items per wave.

nodes.label: CLI command dispatch
nodes.summary: The wire-only `cli/<sub>.py` dispatcher layer (parse argv, lazy-import a domain function, print/exit) plus shared CLI helpers, help, and doc-sync/statusline-dispatch wiring.

nodes.label: Context retrieval query
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/query.py` retrieval engine + `cli/query.py` that grounds planning/build against the existing index (the surface the protected retrieval-eval benchmark gates).

nodes.label: Multi-agent council
nodes.summary: The per-feature council pipeline: stage batching/dispatch (`council_batch.py`), audit log + resumption (`council.py`), the dev-stage feature picker (`dev_pick.py`), and the audit log-entry model.

nodes.label: Technical-debt ledger
nodes.summary: Deterministic harvester + CLI collecting # TODO/FIXME/HACK/DEBT comment markers from Python source into a repo-relative ledger, flagging no-trigger rot-risk entries.

nodes.label: Documentation reorganizer
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/doc_reorg/` domain + `cli/doc_reorg.py` that discovers prose docs and safely proposes a reorganized layout.

nodes.label: Project equipment toolkit
nodes.summary: Renders and evolves a project-tuned Claude Code toolkit (agents, specialists, hooks) and acts as a plugin manager, spanning `context/domains/equip/` (generate/plugins/lifecycle/wiring) and `cli/equip/`.

nodes.label: Extraction & graph backbone
nodes.summary: The deterministic backbone: tree-sitter `pipeline/extract/` (per-language configs + resolver + io cache/git detection), `analysis/` Leiden clustering, and `export/` graph-to-JSON rendering.

nodes.label: Feature taxonomy engine
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/features/` domain that builds, validates, places and renders per-feature `.context/features/<id>/` docs and indexes, plus the bundled HTML graph viewer shipped beside `features/graph.json`.

nodes.label: Context freshness statusline
nodes.summary: Pure badge helper + best-effort cache write at the plan-update CLI boundary + a statusline command and shell scripts that read the cached .context/ drift badge, plus an emit-only SessionStart nudge to wire it.

nodes.label: Install surface
nodes.summary: The `installer/` package (args, install, uninstall, common) plus default-plugin enable/install at install time and the SessionStart hook wiring it manages.

nodes.label: Preflight inventory & ownership
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/preflight/` domain that inventories repo files and computes ownership ahead of equip/adopt decisions.

nodes.label: Proposal store & scaffolding
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/proposals/` domain + `cli/propose.py` that scan, model and persist `.context/proposals/<slug>/` planning artifacts.

nodes.label: Reality-check verifier
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/reality_check.py` domain + CLI that checks feature-doc claims against the real on-disk source tree and reports divergences.

nodes.label: Release & test scaffolding
nodes.summary: Cross-cutting repo plumbing with no single product domain: the release script, shared pytest fixtures/conftest, path helpers, the TS web fixture, the PowerShell statusline script, and the skill-doc/subcommand-help guard tests.

nodes.label: Correctness-gated retrieval eval
nodes.summary: Deterministic benchmark over the SAMPLE_REPO index gating context-query retrieval on hit-rate@3 + MRR against a committed baseline, with a negative control proving the gate is non-vacuous.

nodes.label: Session memory & drift signal
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/memory/` handoff store (now/recent/archive roll, breadcrumb, nudge, transcript parsing) together with the drift + reconcile-gate SessionStart signal it feeds.

nodes.label: Prose source-doc catalog
nodes.summary: The `context/domains/source_docs/` catalog (discovery, readers, refs, writers, confidence keys) that grades prose docs and detects broken references, plus the doc-confidence rendering and the shared ref/extract harvesting helpers.

nodes.label: Tree abstract enrichment
nodes.summary: Plans and applies LLM enrichment of `.context/tree.json` abstracts (EXTRACTED -> INFERRED), driving the `enrich` CLI and the broad end-to-end CLI test surface.

nodes.label: Transcript token usage report
nodes.summary: The stdlib-only `usage/` package that aggregates Claude transcript token usage (incl. subagents) and renders the per-session report, with `cli/memory.py` as its report entrypoint.
